event.description:
Title:

Scala for Machine Learning

Abstract:

What makes Scala particularly suitable to implement machine learning techniques?
The presentation introduces some of the features of Scala critical in building scientific and data mining applications:
1. Implementation of mathematical abstractions (monadic kernels..)
2. Dynamic instantiation of data transformations and workflows (dependency injection)
3. Scalable execution (streaming, data flow control)

Note: Knowledge machine learning is not a pre-requisite to understand the concepts in the presentation

Bio:

Patrick Nicolas is a lead R&D engineer at Dell (Santa Clara). He has 25+ years experience in software engineering, building large scale applications using C++, Java and Scala. His interests include real-time data analytics, modeling and information geometry.
He is the author of "Scala for Machine Learning" Packt Publishing ISBN: 978-1-783355-874-2 2014

Schedule

• 6:30-7:00 - networking

• 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc

• 7:10-~8:40 - talk

• 8:40-9:00 - networking
event.title: Patrick R. Nicolas, "Scala for Machine Learning"
